ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled at the university */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor field of study of the student */,
  "expected_graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_departments" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the department */,
  "expected_completion_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of completion for the student in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "prerequisite_course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the student is enrolled in the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which the student is enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of completion for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "course_id", "semester", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., research, development) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the project (e.g., team lead, team member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_projects" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the student is participating in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the student is participating in the project */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which the student is participating in the project */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the project */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of completion for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "project_id", "semester", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the advisor belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor assigned to the student */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor was assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the student received the grade */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which the student received the grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the student received the grade */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which the student received the grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_grades_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
